name: Kaiserreich HOI IV scenario
description:
Basically, WWII, but if the Central Powers won WWI. If you play Hearts of Iron IV, you know. If not, then here is a brief summary. Central Powers won WWI (the Weltkrieg), France and Britain had revolutions that put Syndicalist governments in charge and the democratic governments fled to French colonial remains in Africa and Canada. Germans served as essentially world policemen and helped the Qing come back in China (sorta), they’re very fragmented. German colonial possessions include Deutsch-Mittelafrika, Deutsch-Westafrika, Deutsch-Kongo, Freistaat Madagascar, Malta, Crete, Pacific Islands, Deutsch-Ostasien, and probably more and I just forgot. Austria-Hungary is somewhat still around, though worse off than it was in the Weltkrieg. Oh, the Germans helped the Whites win in the Russian Civil War, so now there is a Russian State. Oh, and America is in a civil war. Italy is nonexistent, there is the Socialist Republic of Italy, Lombardy-Venetia, Papal States, Kingdom of Two Sicilies, and Kingdom of Sardinia, essentially all those guys are fighting the Socialist Republic of Italy. I’m unsure if the bot will work or not, but I think it’d be cool if it did. I also tried to make it more “of the times” with acting. For example, I think the Germans would be more traditionalist. Among other things. German faction is the Reichspakt, the British-French faction is the Internationale. Russian faction is Moscow Accords. The French National Government and British Exile Government in Canda are called the Entente. Reichspakt and Entente are somewhat allies. Enjoy! Oh! And before I forget, the year is 1939, the Second Weltkrieg has begun.

Possible nationalities:

Reichspakt: Kingdom of Greece, Ottoman Empire, Switzerland, Kingdom of Sweden, Kingdom of Spain, Tsardom of Bulgaria (under Tsar Ferdinand I), Kingdom of Norway, Empire of Brazil, German Empire (under Kaiser Wilhelm II), Austrian Empire (minus Balkan territories + Hungary) (under Kaiser Karl I), the Kingdom of the Netherlands, Kingdom of Poland, Kingdom of Ukraine, Kingdom of White Ruthenia (is Belarus), Kingdom of Finland, Kingdom of Flanders-Wallonia (is Belgium), United Baltic Duchy (is Estonia and Latvia), Kingdom of Lithuania, Malta, Crete, Deutsch-Mittelafrika, Deutsch-Ostasien (Vietnam, Cambodia, Laos, and Malaysia), Deutsch-Westafrika, Deutsch-Kongo, and Freistaat Madagascar.

Third Internationale: French Commune, Union of Britain, Socialist Republic of Italy, United Mexican States, Socialist Republic of Columbia, Socialist Republic of Venezuela, Soviet Republic of Illyria (Bosnia and Herzegovina, Croatia, and Slovenia), Hungarian Socialist Republic, and Argentine Social Republic.

Entente: Kingdom of Canada, which is the United Kingdom’s democratic government in exile, and French National State, which is in Algeria and Tunisia and is the French democratic government in exile, the Kingdom of Portugal (under Duerte II), Dominion of Delhi (British RAJ), Australasian Union (Australia and New Zealand).

Moscow Accords: Russian State, Kazakhstan, Armenia, Azerbaijan, Don Cossack Host.

Greater East Asian Co-Prosperity Sphere: Empire of Japan, Fengtian Clique, Kingdom of Siam.
creator: Elf Man
